title: Chinese chef
meta_description: Chinese Chef | Tampere, Finland - Join Chen Ye Oy's Growing Team! 🌟 Apply now for an experienced Chinese chef role in Tampere, Finland. 💼 Salary: 2300e/kk.
description: Chen Ye Oy, a leading Finnish company with a strong international work environment and growing turnover of 1.06 million in 2024, seeks an experienced Chinese chef to join their team in Tampere. This role requires proficiency in reheating techniques, maintaining the cleanliness of the food preparation area, handing over cooking spaces to subsequent shifts, ensuring correct kitchen appliance temperatures, utilizing cooking finishing methods, and collaborating effectively within a group setting across tourism, accommodation, or catering sectors. The ideal candidate will possess a valid Chinese chef's certificate, demonstrate a proactive work attitude, and be capable of independently planning menus and preparing dishes. With an annual salary of 2300e/kk, this position offers the opportunity for development and permanent employment in a company known for its high turnover rate but with significant financial growth.
what_we_expect: Knack for designing menus for traditional Chinese dishes
At least 2 years of experience as a chef in a Chinese restaurant
Passing the official Chinese chef qualification exam and a valid chef's certificate
Proactive work attitude
Ability to independently plan menus, prepare dishes, and prepare food
job_responsibilities: Prepare dishes for the restaurant's customers
Chinese chef A professional chef is needed to design traditional Chinese menus and prepare dishes for the restaurant's customers.
search_keywords: Chinese chef Chen Ye Oy, Tampere Tampere food-and-restaurant

title: Steinerpedagog/lärare
salary_range: Enligt kollektivavtal för privata socialservice G25 E + behörighetstillägg 160 €/mån, erfarenhetstillägg och mat förmån
meta_description: "Steinerpedagog/lärare in Stockholm: Engaged and passionate about fostering children's development through Steiner pedagogy. Apply now at Steinerlekskolan...
description: We are looking for an engaged Steinerpedagog/lärare who is passionate about working with children in their daily lives and development. As a Steinerpedagog/lärare, you will collaborate with your team to plan, execute, and develop pedagogic activities tailored to the needs of young children. Your role involves supporting children's social and emotional well-being, participating in ongoing assessments and planning for future growth. The Steinerpedagog approach emphasizes nurturing creativity, promoting natural curiosity, and fostering a rhythm-filled day that encourages learning and play among mixed-age groups. Our business offers a safe, comfortable, and pleasant environment where children can grow and develop naturally within age-mixed settings. You will work according to Steinerpedagog principles, focusing on children's innate abilities, creative activities, and the celebration of milestones and traditions. For more information, please contact Maria Stenius at 050-3096786 or via email: forestandare@nackrosen.fi. Send your application and CV to the same email address or to Steinerlekskolan Näckrosen rf, Resovägen 10, 00280 Helsingfors.
what_we_expect: Pedagogy
Determine the child's well-being
Assists in the development of children's personal skills
Take care of children's basic physical needs
Support children's well-being
job_responsibilities: Collaborate with team to plan, execute and develop pedagogic activities for children aged from 0-6 years.
Create a secure, stimulating, and creative environment that promotes children's learning, development, and well-being.
Som lära inom småbarnspedagogik får du arbetra med mångsidiga och kreativa arbetstuften i en mångprofessionell arbetsgemenskap.
what_we_offer: Safe, comfortable, and pleasant day environment
Natural opportunities for children to learn and play in age-mixed groups
Som lära inom småbarnspedagogik får du arbetra med mångsidiga och kreativa arbetstuften i en mångprofessionell arbetsgemenskap.
search_keywords: small children, pedagogic activities, child development, learning environment, creative education

title: Barber

description: Elegance Barber Oy, based in Kuopio, is seeking a skilled and experienced Barber for their full-time permanent position. The ideal candidate should possess at least 5 years of professional experience in the field. This role requires excellent customer service skills alongside exceptional hair-cutting abilities. The working hours are 8 hours per day on five days a week, with an attractive starting salary ranging from €2000 to €3000 per month, depending on collective agreements. Interested parties should contact the company via email at aliaqol@yahoo.com or eleganceparturi@gmail.com for more information and to submit their CV.

title: Licensed caregiver for a private home care company
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Licensed caregiver needed for Rosa hoivapalvelut Oy in Vantaa. Flexible scheduling, 6-month trial period. Nursing degree required. Valid medical licenses...
description: Rosa hoivapalvelut Oy, based in Vantaa, is seeking a licensed caregiver with experience in private home care for its capital region operations. This fixed-term position, lasting 1 year with a 6-month trial period, offers flexible scheduling and requires an independent approach to work with elderly clients. The ideal candidate should have a Nursing degree, valid medical licenses, and experience or interest in providing home-based services for the elderly. They must be able to communicate empathetically and professionally while documenting customer care effectively. Salary is determined by collective agreement in the private social service sector (SOSTES), ranging from €2,300 per month for a caregiver role. The company values ​​direct contact with employees, low hierarchy, and involvement in developing its operations.
what_we_expect: Nursing degree
Valid medical licenses
Experience or desire to learn about home-based services for elderly individuals
Empathetic approach, ability to deal with different customer situations professionally and respectfully
Self-directedness, courage to act in changing situations
Good knowledge of the Finnish language (at least B2)
job_responsibilities: Mobile home care work with flexibility and independent approach, responsibility, good communication skills
Implementing medical treatment in accordance with valid permits
Documentation of customer work (reports, evaluations, and treatment plans)
Cooperation with the rest of the treatment team
what_we_offer: Low hierarchy, direct contact with a superior, opportunity to influence one's work
Goal is to grow in a controlled and long-term way, employee involvement in company development
search_keywords: Licensed caregiver for a private home care company Rosa hoivapalvelut Oy, Vantaa Kauniainen healthcare-and-social-care

title: Helpers in actual Finland
meta_description: Bene Terveyspalvelut Oy, Vantaa: Helpers needed in Kaarina, Turku, Salo, Naantali, and Masku. Personal assistants and caregivers for disability services with...
description: Bene Terveyspalvelut Oy, based in Vantaa, is seeking personal assistants and caregivers for disability services. As a personal assistant, you'll support clients living at home with disabilities or illness, ensuring their daily lives are as comfortable and fulfilling as possible. This role requires excellent communication skills and the ability to work independently while maintaining a cheerful and reliable attitude. The Hourly wage ranges from €12.89 to €14.18, plus 9% holiday allowance and evening/weekend supplements based on TES. With experience ranging from €12.89 for new hires up to €14.18 per hour after ten years of service, the salary is competitive. The company offers flexible working hours that can be tailored to your lifestyle, focusing on a peaceful atmosphere where you can concentrate on your tasks without pressure. Additionally, they provide opportunities to assist clients in various daily activities and make their lives easier and more enjoyable. If you're looking for meaningful work with a growing domestic company specializing in personal assistance and take-home services, this is the perfect fit. Apply easily at benehoiva.fi or contact them via www.benehoiva.fi for your application.
what_we_expect: Good communication skills
Experience as a personal assistant
Desire to help others
job_responsibilities: Enable the client's everyday life by assisting with daily tasks and activities.
what_we_offer: Hourly wage €12.89 + 9% holiday allowance + evening and weekend supplements according to TES
€15-16 salary with 9% holiday allowance + evening and weekend allowances according to TES
Flexible work that can be adapted to your life situation
search_keywords: personal assistant, caregiver, disability services, personal assistance, nursing
